title: VARCHAR extension crossing 255-byte boundary — silent COPY instead of INSTANT
expected_feedback: Standard: VARCHAR(60) → VARCHAR(100) in utf8mb4 crosses the 255-byte boundary (60×4=240 bytes → 100×4=400 bytes). This changes the internal length prefix from 1 byte to 2 bytes, forcing COPY algorithm — ALGORITHM=INSTANT will be rejected. On an 8M-row table, use ALGORITHM=INPLACE, LOCK=NONE, or consider gh-ost.
